problem id: cf447906
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00111001 -> 01001000
  11111111 -> 11110011
  00001001 -> 01001110
  10001110 -> 11001110
  11010101 -> 00010111
  00011101 -> 10001100
  10010000 -> 11101111
  01110001 -> 11000001
  11110100 -> 00100011
  10110100 -> 00101011

query: 11000010
predicted answer: 10000111
